name: /pr-corpus-update reports budget_exhausted with a resets_at timestamp when remaining is zero per L-7 day-rollover signal
command: printf '%s' '{"stripe-node":{"used_today":100000,"date":"2026-05-25"}}' > b.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-update.sh" --source stripe-node --estimated-tokens 1 --budget b.json --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'budget_exhausted' out.txt && grep -q 'resets_at=' out.txt && echo exhausted 1>&2
